title: taraxacum hollandicum
intro: Taraxacum hollandicum, also known as the dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for centuries, boasting medicinal properties such as its ability to stimulate digestion and act as a diuretic, helping to alleviate issues like bloating and urinary problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum hollandicum include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Taraxacum hollandicum is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed as a raw leafy green vegetable.
